Q1.award_name: VN Ops - Spot Bonus Individual Awards - Campaign focus - Q1 2026

113% Quasi GMV with +26.2% MoM growth
118% Mall GMV with +38.2% MoM growth (highest contribution)
104% Live OKR, achieving +57.8% MoM growth

Beyond core delivery, Thanh successfully unlocked new strategic initiatives, including the first Brand Fan Day (Elmich) delivering $113K GMV (113% target), and pitching two Super Brand Days (Elmich & Deli) to build future growth pipeline. Thanh also exceeded talent goals by onboarding 5 new Mall sellers (125% OKR).

Q1.award_name: GNE EMEA Spotlight Award - March
Q1.reason: Nominated by @Jingjing Tu for taking ownership of the Priority Content CCR in Q1, a brand-new, top-tier governance metric with high complexity. As the core POC for this metric, Jack leveraged data analysis and case diagnosis to help the team identify the key issues behind CCR, and closely collaborated with multiple cross-functional teams to design and drive targeted strategy actions. The Priority CCR achieved a 18% reduction in Q1 (target: 15%). Q1.award_name: GNE EMEA Spotlight Award - March
Q1.reason: Deep was nominated by @Jessica C for driving the very complex Late Delivery Fee Charges launch for the Fulfilment team -- the first automated chargeback violation for sellers who have consistently late deliveries. She proactively and thoroughly ensured all aspects of the strategy launch were perfect - from aligning with Legal, GTM, AOC, CS, finance, and Moderation team to ensuring enforcement design was done on time. She also proactively worked with logistics team to ensure appeal was throughly bullet-proof and ensure to protect selected sellers. As a result, this highly-anticipated-to-be-complained strategy is launched smoothly without major complaints from bizops or sellers!

Q1.award_name: GSPOP/2026Q1Spotbonus奖金发放
Q1.reason:
2026年 Q1，家具家装GMV 完成率128%，年同比 177.3%。 
开年聚焦靶向商家，及户外家具&园艺类目春夏应季新品的引入，联动Marketing团队宣发助力行业快速激活和引入潜力爆款，活跃线索入驻数 210->261（增量绝对值行业第一），春夏应季新品数 +67.5%/+133.9%。
供给补齐的同时，通过SKM 1v1 /线下陪跑特训/线上培训等形式，大力推进
①SKPP优化, 使得SKPP 商品数+75%，贡献行业 76% GMV(行业排名第一)；
②新商冷启孵化，实现T3+线索数 80 ->121。
③商家自制视频，方法论到工具（AIGC）助力商家提升视频能力，带动商家视频 GMV 3月对比1月+23.7%。
同步，落地行业自建品类促, 打造50天营销阵线（时间占比 56%) , 营销放大内容体量。3月在沙发品类（占行业15% GMV）因大件物流导致CCR承压时，果断转向应季品类目，通过品类营销Spring Garden，实现应季品GMV3月对比1月上涨5.7倍，贡献行业增量的40%，带动行业GMV 3月对比1月 uplift 175%。

横向端积极主动承担服饰春上新专项的产品标签建设，推动了季节/风格/新品标签上线并加速新品冷启。同步沉淀了商家自制短视频方法论推动服饰自营内容爆发。 
整体上求真务实，积极主动，在取得个人业绩的同时也为团队做出了突出贡献。

Q1.award_name: GSPOP/2026Q1Spotbonus奖金发放
Q1.reason:
Q1 个人GMV完成率128%，3月日均对比1月uplift 163% ；并通过下钻分析友商家装园艺类目结构，锁定头部类目：花园灌溉、花园建筑、种植容器、泳池用品等，定向招商招品，同时挖掘组内存量商家在友商的ASIN快速上翻，并在过程中解决高潜力类目禁限售问题，成功助力小组对应类目商品数量3月对比1月上涨3倍。
此外，举办园艺类商家培训，协助卖家们快速上品和冷启。孵化出潜力卖家后，快速落地4场品牌活动，助力商家快速放大达人短视频体量，配合广告达到店铺GMV峰值。同步，有了爆款和潜爆款后，落地商家商品X机构撮合会。最终，带领小组家装园艺类目商品3月对比1月寄样数量增长13倍，GMV 3月环比1月uplift 571%。

Q1.award_name: GSPOP/2026Q1Spotbonus奖金发放
Q1.reason:
一潇通过重点头商高目标达成品牌营销活动和运动服饰季节类目高速增长实现Q1超标达成。
具体动作：核心季节类目前置布局业务抢跑，营销加持树立标杆
1、业务抢跑：25年Q4提前布局运动服饰-泳衣品类，联动所有泳衣SKM商家、中台和商业化完成爆品/新品备货-达人任务/SVC启动- Q1品牌活动筹备以及商业化投放准备，26年Q1抢跑AMZ的同时也抢跑平台友商
2、营销加持：春节期间充分用好平台“免审寄样品”以及达人SVC和任务赛，保证高寄样量和高履约；推动SKM品牌Eomenie在3月落地泳衣类目首场品牌营销活动，GMV130%完成率，单日最高7.5w的达成，实现单商家快速增长，同时作为类目标杆带动类目增长加速
3、规模复制：以Eomenie为标杆case，梳理类目备货、达人增长、品牌营销以及用户满意度提升的经营策略，实现同品类卖家齐增长，实现Q1新增T3+商家8个，26年vs25年同批卖家GMV增长超过2400%

Q1.award_name: GSPOP/2026Q1Spotbonus奖金发放
Q1.reason:
达人内容货品策略POC，Q1 主要负责趋势品专项，取得较好成绩：
结合趋势类目预测、25年不同月份的爆品同款识别以及内容爬坡热度标签识别，挖掘内容场预期有爆发的商品（该品池每期6K品左右）。
前置推品（前置约6周），并以商家提佣/平台佣金补贴/商家出资活动等手段，针对该货盘进行多重加码。
最终实现该货盘的达人发文渗透+16PP；贡献2月达人内容GMV增量83%、3月GMV增量62%。

Q1.award_name: GSPOP/2026Q1Spotbonus奖金发放

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
VOB产研团队Q1全面升级体验平台（Experience Insight），汇聚9大商家反馈渠道，在短时间内从0到1搭建起“监控大盘体验—智能研判—问题流转—效果验证”的完整链路。并且EI已引入内外部知识库与多域数据，结合AI辅助，显著提升case研判效率与证据链完整度；同期上线个人工作台，后续将以研判风云榜等机制撬动全民关注体验。
EI系统在Q1支持业务研判9个高反馈量跨域的商家体验重点问题（售后4个，物流3个，治理1个，商品1个），9个Case在3月反馈量9.8w，占总反馈量18.7%，优化方案3月-6月陆续落地。目前EI 使用人数已破千，已逐步成为国际电商统一体验中枢，以数据驱动、AI赋能的方式持续支撑商家体验跃迁。
In Q1, the VOB Product & Research team fully upgraded the Experience Insight (EI) platform, aggregating nine major seller feedback channels and rapidly building an end-to-end closed loop from “experience monitoring – intelligent diagnosis – issue routing – impact validation.” EI has integrated internal and external knowledge bases as well as multi-domain data, and, combined with AI assistance, has significantly improved case diagnosis efficiency and the completeness of the evidence chain. A personal workspace was launched in parallel, and mechanisms such as a diagnosis leaderboard will be introduced to drive company-wide attention to experience.
In Q1, the EI system supported the diagnosis of nine high-volume, cross-domain key seller experience issues (four in after-sales, three in logistics, one in governance, and one in products). These nine cases received 98K pieces of feedback in March, accounting for 18.7% of total feedback, with optimization solutions rolling out gradually from March to June. EI has now been adopted by over 1,000 users and is steadily becoming the unified experience hub for International E-commerce, continuously enabling seller experience upgrades through data-driven and AI-powered capabilities.

VOB产研团队Q1全面升级体验平台（Experience Insight），汇聚9大商家反馈渠道，在短时间内从0到1搭建起“监控大盘体验—智能研判—问题流转—效果验证”的完整链路。并且EI已引入内外部知识库与多域数据，结合AI辅助，显著提升case研判效率与证据链完整度；同期上线个人工作台，后续将以研判风云榜等机制撬动全民关注体验。
EI系统在Q1支持业务研判9个高反馈量跨域的商家体验重点问题（售后4个，物流3个，治理1个，商品1个），9个Case在3月反馈量9.8w，占总反馈量18.7%，优化方案3月-6月陆续落地。目前EI 使用人数已破千，已逐步成为国际电商统一体验中枢，以数据驱动、AI赋能的方式持续支撑商家体验跃迁。
In Q1, the VOB Product & Research team fully upgraded the Experience Insight (EI) platform, aggregating nine major seller feedback channels and rapidly building an end-to-end closed loop from “experience monitoring – intelligent diagnosis – issue routing – impact validation.” EI has integrated internal and external knowledge bases as well as multi-domain data, and, combined with AI assistance, has significantly improved case diagnosis efficiency and the completeness of the evidence chain. A personal workspace was launched in parallel, and mechanisms such as a diagnosis leaderboard will be introduced to drive company-wide attention to experience.
In Q1, the EI system supported the diagnosis of nine high-volume, cross-domain key seller experience issues (four in after-sales, three in logistics, one in governance, and one in products). These nine cases received 98K pieces of feedback in March, accounting for 18.7% of total feedback, with optimization solutions rolling out gradually from March to June. EI has now been adopted by over 1,000 users and is steadily becoming the unified experience hub for International E-commerce, continuously enabling seller experience upgrades through data-driven and AI-powered capabilities.

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
黄丹蕾作为直播拍卖项目owner，在资源极其紧张、跨域协同压力很大的情况下，顺利推动EU&UK的上线，Q1期间完成MVP在重点商家的试跑，取得显著成效；同时，在MVP版本基础上，快速对标US当前能力，在Q1完成了80%的能力对齐；合规差异的部分，主导并推动降险方案的设计和落地，目前重要的功能如temporary listing在UK已上线，EU降险开发中。这个过程中，她体现出极强的工作热情、责任心和协作精神，与业务一起在目标极具难度的情况下，快速的取得了项目第一阶段的进展。
具体产出如下，
拍卖项目推进与效果验证
协同运营在Q1引入5个商家完成10场直播，验证拍卖模式能够有效提升直播效率：拍卖直播间流量（PV/hour）提升70%–110%，成交效率（GMV/hour）提升270%–620%。在此基础上，快速推进二期产品优化，上线15秒快速拍卖、一键出价（one-click bid）等核心功能，显著降低用户参与门槛，累计出价成功用户数（Bid Success UV）提升26.9%。同时，针对商家侧优化操作体验，包括新增APP端操作能力、缩短拍卖创建路径等，提升整体使用效率，累计拍卖开播UV提升20%。整体来看，拍卖从0到1完成验证，并进入规模化优化阶段，为Q2放量打下基础。 
商家与达人开播撬动
基于国内成熟经验，设计并落地Pontos激励任务，驱动商家开播意愿，除IT外各市场开播时长提升9%–69%；同时补齐达人开播卡，通过AB实验验证对达人开播有明显拉动（Go-Live UV渗透率+3.84%），有效扩大直播供给。

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
胡昊始终以价值观为驱动，坚定践行“追求极致”的字节范，在高质量完成PO本职工作的基础上，主动承担大量PM相关职能，在买返、样品等核心工作中发挥了关键支撑作用。
Driven by values, huhao has always firmly practiced ByteDance's spirit of "Strive for Excellence". On the basis of completing his own PO work with high quality, he takes the initiative to assume a large number of PM-related functions and plays a key supporting role in core work such as rebate and samples.
他在数据追踪、业务经营方面技能熟练度，和自驱性强、勇于担当的特质，帮助团队在买返专项、免费样品提渗透方面都取得了很不错的结果，是团队中价值观与业务能力双优的标杆。
His proficiency in data tracking and business operation, as well as his characteristics of strong self-motivation and courage to take responsibility, have helped the team achieve excellent results in the rebate special project and the penetration improvement of free samples, making him a benchmark with both excellent values and professional capabilities in the team.

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
霄涵作为区域PO，在2个极其复杂的跨区域全球项目中，独当一面，均在Q1顺利与US保持同步推进上线。虽然两个项目都还在早期纠偏和验证的阶段，但本身在极其复杂的跨团队（欧洲/US业务 + US/中台产品 + 算法 + DS）、跨区、跨时差的复杂项目上，能以极高人效 ROI、独立地推进、识别风险、解决、到上线，没有让UK/EU落下，并以积极的心态解决问题，这种使命必达、不设边界、共同成长的精神，非常值得肯定，也树立区域PO和中台/US产品在大项目合作上的典范。

托管项目经历了极其复杂的需求定义->区域对齐->把关产品方案->协调资源保障同步推进的过程，xiaohan 在其中体现了坚韧不拔、使命必达精神，才能在多轮不断对齐和把关下保障了项目上线；上线后积极推进灯塔测试（12个商家测试中），主动做好商家GTM，并发现、跟进解决许多关键问题，同时也为产品MVP的不足兜底和业务、商家沟通，在极大压力下依然抱有积极的心态解决问题、拿结果。

图文项目上涉及工程、GNE、算法、广告多方，霄涵在其中有条不紊地了解对齐所有依赖方的需求评估、时间、当发现GNE审核有卡点时，积极推动解决，保证图文发文能力、c端样式、审核、图文投广、AIGC图文托管等项目均在Q1如期上线，在极其复杂的合作关系下稳步推进拿到上线结果。同时在Q1测试阶段，与业务定义好开白范围并稳步推进放量测试，EU/UK 日发文数从 0->1465 (vs US 1956)，vv / 动销率 > US，拿到阶段性数据验证和case分析，为下一阶段奠定基础。

希望霄涵能获得Q1 Spot Bonus，为区域在这类跨区域大项目的推进上树立榜样。

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
Nhat作为SEA Finance & Compliance PMM，对接资金中台，Q1 核心贡献：
1. 牵头输出《SEA | 资金中台产品需求 SOP》，建立需求提报→量化优先级→资源对齐→需求追踪闭环流程，实现 SEA 需求池与中台需求池 100% 同步，解决了跨区域需求零散、资源错配的历史问题。
2. 落地高敏 GTM 风控机制，实现所有上线项目零合规事故、零负面舆情：
营收类（共 7 项）：推动营销套餐收银台银行转账、MY基础设施费、ID 广告佣金、ID 藏价运费等高优项目全部按时合规上线，无任何负面舆情
合规类（共 3 项）：完成 ID 个税征管系统对接、VN 完税证明等 P0 合规项目按时落地，100% 覆盖商家，零 PR/GR 风险
3.  建立的标准化流程和风控机制已成为全团队标准，为 Q2"零合规 / 营收变更 PR/GR 事故" 目标打下坚实基础。

Nhat, as SEA Finance & Compliance PMM, aligned to the central Fund Center product team, delivered exceptional business impact in Q1 2026:
1. Designed and launched the SEA | Fund Center Product Requirement SOP, establishing a unified closed-loop requirement management process with 100% synchronization between SEA and global Fund Center demand pools, eliminating long-standing resource misallocation issues.
2. Implemented high-sensitivity GTM risk control mechanism, achieving zero compliance incidents and zero negative public sentiment for all launched projects:
7 revenue projects: Successfully delivered all high-priority revenue initiatives on schedule, including bank transfer for marketing packages ($33M total revenue), MY infrastructure fee ($400k daily revenue uplift),  ID ads commission, and ID hidden shipping fee, with no negative PR/GR incidents.
3 compliance projects: Rolled out all P0 compliance initiatives including ID withholding tax system connection and VN withholding tax certificate on schedule with 100% merchant coverage, meeting all regulatory deadlines without any risk exposure.
3. The standardized framework and risk control process he built has been adopted as the official standard for the SEA and fund center, laying a solid foundation for zero PR/GR incidents for all compliance and revenue changes.

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
本立在Q1通过提升内容场景营销氛围表达，在补贴恒定的基础上，拿到了GMV的显著收益，并持续识别并拆解后续提升方向。在推动项目落地过程中，本立能有效基于US/SEA能力，通过数据分析和认知，以最小的成本落地本地化差异化能力，与此同时，还保持独立创新能力，提出多个其他区域还未尝试的玩法，拿到显著收益
1. 内容场GMV显著收益：建设直播间购物袋弹窗，直播间营销胶囊，直播间购物袋教育气泡，短视频锚点利益点，累积BR大盘GMV+1.54%，BR直播GMV+1.62%，BR短视频GMV+1.68%；MX大盘GMV+0.47%，短视频GMV+0.73%
2. 识别当前LATAM内容场景C端短板并提出可落地的规划：识别短板为营销氛围感弱，购物袋点击率低，互动指标弱，提出并落地弹窗二期，短视频锚点信息丰富化，氛围弹幕等别的市场均未尝试的方案，以提升LATAM内容场景GMV
Benli achieved significant content GMV growth in Q1 by enhancing the promotion atmosphere in content scenarios while subsidy remain unchanged, and continued discover. During project, based on the US/SEA live, Benli used data analysis to those features to be localized with minimal cost; meanwhile, Benli also keeps creativity to raise many features that US/SEA has not yet tried, and then created significant benefits:
Significant GMV growth in content scenarios: Through touchpoints such as livestream shopping bag pop-ups, livestream marketing capsules, livestream shopping bag educational bubbles, and short video anchor points, cumulative BR overall GMV increased by 1.54%, BR livestream GMV increased by 1.62%, and BR short video GMV increased by 1.68%; MX overall GMV increased by 0.47%, and short video GMV increased by 0.73%. 
Identifying current weaknesses in LATAM content scenarios for end users and proposing feasible solutions: Weak marketing atmosphere, low shopping bag click-through rates, and weak interaction metrics were identified. The company proposed and implemented solutions such as a second phase of pop-ups, enriched short video anchor information, and atmospheric bullet comments—solutions not yet tried in other markets—to improve LATAM content scenario GMV.

Q1.award_name: Product, UG, Design Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
Q1 朱静怡同学 致力于达人成长的能力建设，识别新达人孵化卡点提升孵化效率，优化任务表达形式上线Primary 阶梯任务，在FYP中提升达人任务曝光，以上举措取在投稿上取得明显突破 ，分别取得发文率6.27%，发文UV + 6.5% 的提升。此外，与拉美运营团队协作，识别高潜达人并针对性解决达人获样难，目标牵引不足等问题，提升整体跃迁率MX + 32%，BR +91%、助力业务完成L2达人数的提升MX L2 达人 4,969 提升至 7,186（+44%）。

Q1.award_name: 2026Q1 季度之星申请- 团队奖
Q1.reason:
Background
 In Q4 2025, 86.9% of exit inventory orders took more than 12 days from creation to handover, with an average dwell time of 46.8 days. Orders often remained idle after packing, waiting for merchant actions such as creating appointments or providing labels.
 Merchants required packing details from ops before generating labels or booking pickup, creating a circular dependency.
 Freight orders required appointments without confirmed readiness, leading to no-shows and stalled orders, with most coordination handled through tickets, emails, and Excel trackers.
  
 Seller Experience
 Before: Merchants had no direct visibility into packing status and depended on ops to share dimensions and readiness.
 They had to wait, generate labels externally, and coordinate pickup separately, leading to multiple back-and-forth steps.
  
 After: FBT Shipping enables label generation and shipment directly within the flow without waiting for ops input.
 This drove FBT shipping adoption to 87% for small parcel orders and 73% for freight exit inventory orders.
  
 Results
 Following the launch at the end of January, the share of orders dwelling over 12 days from creation dropped from 86.9% to 28.3% in February (a 58.6% reduction).
 Average dwell time decreased from 46.8 days to 6.73 days, driven by reduced backlog and fewer operational touchpoints.

Q1.award_name: Raya Ramadan Campaign Award + Q1 Spot Bonus
Q1.reason:
[Role]  Live Project Manager
[Join date]  2025-01-03
[Reason for nomination]
Faye is nominated for the Scale New Heights Award for delivering strong Q1 results under a highly challenging business rhythm, while also driving new growth experiments for the project. In a quarter with tight timelines, multiple campaign peaks, and heavy cross-functional coordination, she showed strong ownership and agility in pushing alignment, securing resources, and landing business outcomes.
She not only supported solid delivery on core P0 metrics, but also helped to contribute to a historic live market share breakthrough, with a record 415% peak in Feb. Beyond BAU, she also drove the successful pilot of Brand Galaxy 1.0, creating an early validated path for incremental growth. Her contribution stands out for combining reliable execution with breakthrough and innovation.

[Evidence and data supporting the contribution]
In Q1, Daily Live GMV maintained growth momentum with QoQ +31%, monthly attainment reached 108% in Jan, 117% in Feb, and 121% in Mar. Daily LS5+ accounts reached 2,315 (128% attainment), including 1,418 sellers (118%) and 897 creators (148%). Live market share remained above 350% throughout the quarter and hit a record 415% in February.
Faye also drove strong policy and innovation outcomes. Top-tier cluster policy covered 1.4k+ sellers, delivered $51M GMV and $6.4M incremental GMV. Mid- and low-tier policy generated $27M GMV and $8.2M incremental GMV, with +43% MoM uplift. Meanwhile, Brand Galaxy 1.0 proved positive in Q1 and 2.0 secured 225 confirmed sellers as of Apr-10, with estimated output of 100+ new accounts and $1.4M incremental GMV.

Q1.award_name: 国际电商用研26-Q1 Spotbonus
Q1.reason:
在内容托管MVP阶段，本项目识别出商家侧增量难归因、内容产量质量难确定及ROI模型难持续等核心卡点，直接推动了如下业务动作，助力项目从“粗放铺量”向“确定性增长”转型：
1. 上线“一本账”与对照组归因，向商家明确展示货架/达人/广告各场域带来的独立增量；促成V2.0广告CPS长期方案规划，向商家交付“可解释的增量”。
2. 推动V1.5产品试点“极致履约”派单能力，并强制引入“运营预审”机制与前置Brief；AIGC建设先审后发/BPO审核流程，前置拦截风险，解决内容产量质量问题
3. 推动招商团队修改GTM话术，将核心卖点从“承诺绝对GMV”转变为“节省人力、绿色通道及品牌资产沉淀”。建立商家分层策略，明确不同商家冷启投入阈值与跃迁路径，解决ROI预期问题
